/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/ImGuiFreeze.dir/extern/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_sdl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImGuiFreeze.dir/extern/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_sdlgpu3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImGuiFreeze.dir/extern/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImGuiFreeze.dir/extern/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImGuiFreeze.dir/extern/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImGuiFreeze.dir/extern/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImGuiFreeze.dir/extern/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImGuiFreeze.dir/extern/imgui/examples/example_sdl3_sdlgpu3/main.cpp.o -o ImGuiFreeze  -Wl,-rpath,/home/caillin/Documents/repos/imgui-freeze/build/extern/SDL extern/SDL/libSDL3.so.0.4.2
